title: Senate Democrats urge AG Bondi and Treasury Sec. Bessent to probe Binance amid sanctions concerns
message_html: Senate Democrats urge AG Bondi and Treasury Sec. Bessent to probe Binance amid sanctions concerns ...
snippet: Senate Democrats are urging AG Pam Bondi to investigate Binance following reports that the crypto giant may be violating sanctions laws.

title: Cardano gets USDC-backed stablecoin access via Circle's infrastructure
message_html: Cardano gets USDC-backed stablecoin access via Circle's infrastructure ...
snippet: Input Output Group has today announced a major step forward for the Cardano ecosystem, the launch of USDCx on Cardano using Circle’s xReserve infrastructure.
